name: Walpurgis Night
traditions: Bonfires; dancing around maypoles; witch costumes; traditional songs; celebrating the arrival of spring; parades.
historicalBackground: Walpurgis Night blends pre-Christian spring celebrations with the feast of Saint Walpurga. In Germanic folklore, witches gather on the Brocken mountain.
description: A night of bonfires and revelry across Northern Europe, celebrating spring's arrival with ancient traditions of fire, dance, and witch folklore.
